mnemonics: Navigate the file tree like a CHDIRver
keyPoints: chdir() changes the current working directory of the calling process
It takes a single argument: the path to the new directory
Returns 0 on success and -1 on error, with errno set appropriately
commonMistakes: Forgetting to check the return value for errors
Using relative paths without considering the current working directory
Assuming it affects other processes or the shell itself (it's process-specific)
